network-privacy.note: Adds a "visible only to subscribers" option in Settings → Reading. Pair with subscriber accounts to make a site private to invited users on multisite hosts like my.wordpress.net.

password-protected.note: Lock your entire site behind a single shared password — perfect for a private family blog on a self-hosted WordPress.

enable-mastodon-apps.note: Turn your WordPress into a Mastodon-compatible server so anyone can post via any Mastodon app.

send-to-e-reader.title: Send to E-Reader
send-to-e-reader.author: Alex Kirk
send-to-e-reader.note: Push articles to your Kindle or Kobo as ePub or by email — read long-form away from the browser.

pro-mime-types.note: Lets you upload file types WordPress blocks by default (SVG, WebP variants, etc.) without editing code.

duplicate-page.note: Adds a one-click "Duplicate" action to posts and pages — great for reusing a layout you like.

family-wiki.note: Turn your site into a private family wiki with nested pages and shared editing.

secure-custom-fields.note: Add structured fields (dates, relations, places) to pages so facts stay consistent and searchable. A WordPress-maintained fork of ACF.

wp-dashboard-notes.note: Pin sticky notes to your WordPress dashboard — handy for to-dos and reminders you'll actually see.

wordpress-beta-tester.note: Opt into WordPress beta and release-candidate builds to try new features before they ship.

static-archive.title: Static Archive
static-archive.author: Alex Kirk
static-archive.note: Export your blog as static HTML so you keep a self-contained archive even if your site changes.

chat-to-blog.title: Chat to Blog
chat-to-blog.author: Alex Kirk
chat-to-blog.note: Import photos and media from Beeper chats directly into WordPress posts. Requires Beeper Desktop running.

post-collection.title: Post Collection
post-collection.author: Alex Kirk
post-collection.note: Clip articles from around the web into your WordPress as their own post type — handy with the Friends reader.

personal-crm.title: Personal CRM
personal-crm.author: Alex Kirk
personal-crm.note: A private contact directory inside your WordPress — names, notes, last-contact dates, custom fields. Works great alongside Keeping Contact.

keeping-contact.title: Keeping Contact
keeping-contact.author: Alex Kirk
keeping-contact.note: Reminder companion for Personal CRM — set a check-in cadence per contact and get nudged when it's been too long.

friends.title: Friends
friends.note: Subscribe to RSS, Atom, and ActivityPub feeds — your private feed reader, with following / follower model and Mastodon support.

memex.title: Memex
memex.author: Alex Kirk
memex.note: A note-taking app inside WordPress with [[wiki-links]], automatic backlinks, daily notes, and tags. One-click import from Obsidian, Notion, Evernote, or Roam Research.

my-apps.note: A home-screen-style launcher for the apps and admin links you actually use — drag-to-reorder, a built-in app store for one-click blueprint installs, and a mobile-friendly layout.

desktop-mode.title: Desktop Mode
desktop-mode.author: WordPress
desktop-mode.note: Reimagines /wp-admin as a desktop OS — admin screens open as draggable, resizable windows on a wallpaper, with a dock built from the admin menu. Per-user opt-in, fully reverts on deactivation.
